results.rendered_html: adharmya (3. a + dharmya) adj. f. ā = adharmiṣṭha. adharmyāṃ jahi dharmo hyasyā na vidyate  R. 1,27,18 . pañcānāṃ (vivāhānāṃ) tu trayo dharmyā dvāvadharmyau smṛtāviha  M. 3,25 . vacaḥ  R. 2,21,22 . rājyam 48,19 .
